permits.description: Convert 2 family to single family. Update all framing and MEP's per proposed plans: BASEMENT: Finish basement, add 1 bathroom FIRST FLOOR: remove 2 bedrooms, relayout kitchen SECOND FLOOR: Remove kitchen, add 1 bathroom, add 1 bedroom THIRD FLOOR: Remove 1 bedroom, add 1 bathroom. Install new board and plaster, tile, flooring, cabinets, and trim work. Paint exterior and interior.
